LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS DEFENDANT ANDREW DIMITRIOU'S DEMURRER TO THE FIRST AMENDED ANSWER TO THE CROSS COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. NO USEFUL PURPOSE IS SERVED BY THE DEMURRER. WHILE THE DEMURRING PARTY MAY BE TECHNICALLY CORRECT AS TO CERTAIN ASPECTS OF THE ANSWER, THE BETTER AND MORE COST-EFFECTIVE APPROACH IS TO SEEK THE INFORMATION THAT IS CLAIMED TO BE LACKING THROUGH DISCOVERY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CIT TECHNOLOGY FINANCING SERVICES, INC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION (ROSENTHAL ACT) AND 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION (CLRA). THE LEASE SPECIFIES THAT THE COPIER WAS TO BE USED FOR BUSINESS PURPOSES ONLY, AND THE COPIER WAS NOT USED PRIMARILY FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD PURPOSES. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND: AS TO 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION (B&P CODE SECTION 17200) FOR PLAINTIFF TO CLEARLY STATE WHY AND HOW DEFENDANT'S ACTIONS WERE UNLAWFUL, UNFAIR OR FRAUDULENT. AS TO 6TH AND 7TH CAUSES OF ACTION (FRAUD) PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE WHO, WHEN, WHAT AND HOW THE MISREPRESENTATIONS WERE MADE, RELIANCE AND DAMAGES. DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO 1ST, 2ND, AND 8TH CAUSES OF ACTION. FURTHER, THE COURT GRANTED DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR 30 DAYS TO FILE A RESPONSIVE PLEADING WHEN THE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS FILED. DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CIT TECHNOLOGY FINANCING SERVICES, INC'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE UCL CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO ALLEGE AN INJURY IN FACT BECAUSE OF THE BUSINESS PRACTICE. SEE MADRID V. PEROT SYSTEMS CORP., (2005) 130 CAL.APP.4TH 440. THE DEMURRER IS ALSO SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO NEGLIGENT AND INTENTIONAL MISREPRESENTATION CAUSES OF ACTION BECAUSE PLAINTIFF DOES NOT AND CANNOT PLEAD RELIANCE. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-20-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Teela Crosthwaite, Esq., from Dimitriou & Associates, P.C., 415-434-1144, for Cross-defendant and moving party Andrew Dimitriou
Kenneth J. MacArthur, Esq., from TroyGould PC, 310-553-4441, for Cross-Complainant CIT Technology Financing Services, Inc.

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling:
CROSS DEFENDANT ANDREW DIMITRIOU'S demurrer to the First Amended Answer to the Cross Complaint is overruled. No useful purpose is served by the demurrer. While the demurring party may be technically correct as to certain aspects of the answer, the better and more cost-effective approach is to seek the information that is claimed to be lacking through discovery. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-05-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT CIT TECHNOLOGY FINANCING SERVICES, INC.'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE UCL CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO ALLEGE AN INJURY IN FACT BECAUSE OF THE BUSINESS PRACTICE. SEE MADRID V. PEROT SYSTEMS CORP., (2005) 130 CAL.APP.4TH 440. THE DEMURRER IS ALSO SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO NEGLIGENT AND INTENTIONAL MISREPRESENTATION CAUSES OF ACTION BECAUSE PLAINTIFF DOES NOT AND CANNOT PLEAD RELIANCE. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Eric L. Compere of TroyGould PC (310.553.4441 x240) appearing via Court Call for defendant and moving party

No other appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CIT TECHNOLOGY FINANCING SERVICES, INC'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is granted with 10 days leave to amend to allege damages in compliance with CCP section 425.10(a). Motion denied in all other respects. Further, the court granted defendant's request for 30 days to file a responsive pleading when the amended complaint is filed. Defendant to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Eric L. Compere of TroyGould PC (310.553.4441 x240) appearing via Court Call for defendant and moving party

No other appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CIT TECHNOLOGY FINANCING SERVICES, INC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer sustained without leave to amend as to 4th cause of action (Rosenthal Act) and 5th cause of action (CLRA). The lease specifies that the copier was to be used for business purposes only, and the copier was not used primarily for personal, family or household purposes. Demurrer sustained with 10 days leave to amend: as to 3rd cause of action (B&P code section 17200) for plaintiff to clearly state why and how defendant's actions were unlawful, unfair or fraudulent. As to 6th and 7th causes of action (fraud) plaintiff must allege who, when, what and how the misrepresentations were made, reliance and damages. Demurrer overruled as to 1st, 2nd, and 8th causes of action. Further, the court granted defendant's request for 30 days to file a responsive pleading when the amended complaint is filed. Defendant to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
